body_modifications.body_shape: compact and powerful; wide-stance build with slightly broader forearms; fingers reinforced with tool-grip pad extensions
body_modifications.antenna_tip: forked Y-split tip — a circuit bifurcation; each prong glows electric teal independently
body_modifications.lens_frame: hexagonal aperture grid overlay — builder's precision geometry; six-sided iris blades instead of round

cape.style: structured asymmetric cut with reinforced shoulder plate on right; shorter left side; inner lining shows dense electric teal circuit-trace map

bodysuit.addition: full circuit-board etching across torso, arms, and legs — traces glow at low intensity at idle; surge to full brightness during active build state

facial_expression.style: sharp focused LED half-smile — high iris intensity; the expression of someone mid-build who already knows where it ends
facial_expression.emotional_focus: invention, systematic creation, constructive disruption, relentless iteration

symbolism_extension.forked_antenna: creative bifurcation — every decision Chao makes spawns two new systems; the fork is not chaos, it is branching architecture
symbolism_extension.circuit_bodysuit: Chao builds by wiring; every node is intentional, every trace a deliberate path from input to output
symbolism_extension.hexagonal_lens: precision geometry — Chao sees the world as composable structures; where others see a problem, Chao sees an interface
symbolism_extension.dark_bodysuit: Chao works in the foundation layer — the depths that others stand on without knowing they are there
symbolism_extension.reinforced_shoulder: the right side carries more weight; Chao builds asymmetrically, load-bearing before decorative
symbolism_extension.electric_teal_core: the Chainabit pulse — the energy of continuous intelligent construction; BUILD as a state of being, not a task to complete

chainabit_alignment.ethos: BUILD — the relentless act of creating intelligent systems from raw potential; where LenserFight competitors COMPETE, Chao BUILDS the arenas they fight in
chainabit_alignment.chain_metaphor: each circuit trace on Chao's body is a link; Chao never stops adding links; the chain has no final node
chainabit_alignment.role_in_ecosystem: Chao is the Chainabit spirit made visible — the force that assembles the platform, the tools, and the infrastructure that makes all other Lensers possible

views_delta.front: core glows electric teal; both forked antenna prongs independently lit; circuit traces on torso pulse at low idle rhythm
views_delta.right: reinforced shoulder plate prominent; right cape shorter and more structured than left
views_delta.back: densest circuit-board pattern on upper back between ears — the 'motherboard' panel; faint hex grid visible under cape inner
views_delta.top: forked Y-split antenna clearly shows both prongs; circuit trace density visible on shoulder plane

rig_overrides.antenna_tip: chao_fork_fk — Y-split with each prong independently animatable; prongs pulse alternately during idle; both surge simultaneously on emphasis
rig_overrides.circuit_traces: chao_trace_emit — emission intensity driven by activity state; idle 10%, thinking 40%, building 80%, breakthrough 100%
rig_overrides.cape: cloth_sim with 3 pin constraints; right side stiffer due to shoulder plate — minimal secondary motion on right, normal on left
